creator: duchateau.olivier@gmail.com
text:
You can close it. I send new PR,
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=3D156415 because I use PPA
repository (hosted by launchpad) of main developper. I add new patches
(or enhanced previously them).


2011/3/4 Martin Wilke <miwi@freebsd.org>:
> try to install a tinderbox and u can reproduce this.
>
> On Sat, Mar 5, 2011 at 2:50 AM, Olivier Duchateau
> <duchateau.olivier@gmail.com> wrote:
>>
>> The following reply was made to PR ports/155263; it has been noted by

d
